title: Subagent Output Envelopes
description: Phase 5 contract boundary. Each capability-gated subagent (harvester / teardown / sourcing) returns one of these envelopes. The payload arrays $ref the recommendation-object $defs so the subagent contract and the final-object contract are ONE source of truth (no drift). The orchestrator schema-validates every return and discards (records, never fabricates around) any that fails. agent is a discriminator so a misrouted return cannot be silently accepted.

universe_delta.description: What this subagent contributed to search_universe — folded back by the orchestrator so the run's counters stay honest.

budgets_hit.description: Real budget exhaustions the subagent hit. The `invalid_budget:` prefix is RESERVED for the orchestrator's own config-validation markers (which are excluded from the access gate); a subagent may not use it — doing so would let a spoofed entry suppress the access determination, so such a return is rejected at the boundary.

candidates.description: May be empty: an honest harvest that found nothing is still a valid return — but an EMPTY return MUST carry a search_universe_delta (so the orchestrator sees WHY breadth narrowed). Fabricating a candidate to avoid an empty array is forbidden.

shortlist.description: May be empty (honest no-result return; never fabricated). An EMPTY return MUST carry a search_universe_delta so the orchestrator sees why it was empty.

offers.description: May be empty (honest no-offer return; never fabricated — a sourcing gap is recorded, not filled with a guess). An EMPTY return MUST carry a search_universe_delta.
